output: Executed batch 2 for T2 and T4. T2 now threads `timeline_placement` into all three relevant create-task resolvers, including the previously missing `imageGeneration.ts` lineage call. T4 now resolves deterministic placement for a single timeline-backed selected clip, exposes that anchor in prompt context, accepts `timeline_placement` in the `create_task` tool schema, and forwards it through `tools/create-task.ts` into `tools/generation.ts` so it reaches the create-task HTTP request body. The batch checkpoint file was not present/writable, so no checkpoint was written.
deviations: T4 required touching additional shared/persistence files beyond the initially listed file set so the server-resolved placement object could survive stored-turn attachment round-trips: `src/tools/video-editor/types/agent-session.ts` and `supabase/functions/ai-timeline-agent/types.ts`. Existing edge tests in `supabase/functions/ai-timeline-agent/selectedClips.test.ts` and `supabase/functions/ai-timeline-agent/loop.test.ts` were also extended for verification.

Broader create-task edge suites still fail for pre-existing reasons unrelated to this batch's placement wiring: `supabase/functions/create-task/index.test.ts` is asserting the old request/validation contract and currently receives `family field is required`, and `supabase/functions/create-task/resolvers/__tests__/dispatch.test.ts` still fails because its mocked `https://deno.land/std@0.224.0/http/server.ts` surface does not provide `__resetServeHandler`. Both full files were rerun independently with this batch's changes applied.

task_updates.executor_notes: Updated all three resolver inputs to accept `timeline_placement`, passed that field into `setTaskLineageFields`, and added the missing `imageGeneration.ts` lineage hook immediately after `buildTaskParams()` returns. Verification: code inspection confirms `imageGeneration.ts` now calls `setTaskLineageFields()` post-`buildTaskParams`, and `magicEdit.ts` / `zImageTurboI2I.ts` now forward `input.timeline_placement` into `timelinePlacement`. There is still no resolver-level placement test yet; that remains future T6 work. Broader create-task edge suites were rerun, but the current failures are pre-existing and unrelated to `timeline_placement` threading (`index.test.ts` expects the old family-less request shape; `dispatch.test.ts` has a broken mocked `__resetServeHandler`).

Added `resolveTimelinePlacement()` in `selectedClips.ts`, enriched selected clips after `loadTimelineState()` in `runAgentLoop()`, persisted the resolved placement on stored turn attachments for recovery, exposed the placement anchor conservatively in `prompts.ts`, added `timeline_placement` to the `create_task` schema, validated it in `tools/create-task.ts`, and threaded it through `CreateGenerationTaskArgs` into `tools/generation.ts` so `buildCreateTaskRequest()` includes it in the create-task request input. Verification: focused edge suites passed for `selectedClips.test.ts`, `loop.test.ts`, and `tools/create-task.test.ts`; frontend attachment/session suites also passed after the shared attachment type gained `timelinePlacement`.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Confirmed by inspection that `imageGeneration.ts` now calls `setTaskLineageFields()` after `buildTaskParams()` returns, and all three resolvers (`imageGeneration.ts`, `magicEdit.ts`, `zImageTurboI2I.ts`) pass `input.timeline_placement` into the lineage call as `timelinePlacement`.

Confirmed by inspection that `tool-schemas.ts` now exposes optional `timeline_placement`, `tools/create-task.ts` reads and validates it, and `tools/generation.ts` includes it in the `buildCreateTaskRequest()` input payload that is POSTed to the create-task edge function. Focused edge tests for selected clip enrichment / loop prompting / create-task tool threading passed.
